configurations.name: VOIDWEAR Dev Server
runtimeArgs: require('http').createServer((req,res)=>{const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');let f=req.url==='/'?'index.html':req.url.slice(1);let fp=path.join(process.cwd(),decodeURIComponent(f));fs.readFile(fp,(e,d)=>{if(e){res.writeHead(404);res.end('Not found');}else{const ext=path.extname(fp).slice(1);const mime={'html':'text/html','css':'text/css','js':'text/javascript','svg':'image/svg+xml','png':'image/png','jpg':'image/jpeg','gif':'image/gif','ico':'image/x-icon'};res.writeHead(200,{'Content-Type':mime[ext]||'application/octet-stream'});res.end(d);}});}).listen(5500,()=>console.log('Server running on port 5500'))
